headline: KPMG Deploys Claude to 276,000 Staff
summary: KPMG deployed Anthropic's Claude across its entire 276,000-person workforce to revamp global tax and advisory platforms. This represents the largest consulting firm AI rollout, creating competitive pressure for other firms to match AI-enhanced service delivery.
so_what: KPMG's enterprise-wide Claude deployment to 276,000 users represents the largest consulting firm AI rollout. This signals how aggressively Big Four firms are betting on AI to transform client delivery.
original_title: Exclusive | KPMG Taps Anthropic to Revamp Global Tax, Advisory Platforms
